CustomField.description: The supplemental rent ID and the amount should be entered here in this format (a373w000002zLz1AAE:3000, a373w000002zLz1AAF:1200) for the legacy invoices to upload the correct MR invoices.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The supplemental rent ID and the amount should be entered here in this format (a373w000002zLz1AAE:3000, a373w000002zLz1AAF:1200) for the legacy invoices to upload the correct MR invoices.
CustomField.label: MR Invoice line Items
